question: What type of work environment do you prefer?

options.text: Fast-paced environment focused on solving problems
Creative and flexible environment
Structured workplace with clear procedures
Team-based environment with frequent interaction

question: Which activity sounds most enjoyable to you?

options.text: Writing code and fixing bugs
Designing interfaces or visuals
Setting up computers or networks
Talking with users and understanding their needs

question: When faced with a difficult problem, what is your usual approach?

options.text: Break it down logically and analyze each part
Think of creative or unconventional solutions
Follow proven methods or existing systems
Discuss it with others to gain different perspectives

question: Which task would you feel most confident handling?

options.text: Solving logical or technical challenges
Creating designs or improving visual appeal
Managing tools, hardware, or technical setups
Communicating ideas clearly with others

question: What motivates you the most in a project?

options.text: Finding efficient and accurate solutions
Expressing ideas in a creative way
Ensuring everything works smoothly and reliably
Working closely with people toward a shared goal

question: Which role do you naturally take in group activities?

options.text: The problem-solver who handles complex tasks
The idea-generator who suggests creative concepts
The organizer who keeps things structured
The communicator who connects the team
